revision.text:
{{#time:F Y|{{{2|August}}} {{{1|20}}}-1 month}}

''''

{{#time:F Y|{{{2|August}}} {{{1|20}}}-1 month {{{3|2006}}}}}

''''

{{#time:F Y|{{{2|August}}} {{{1|20}}} {{{3|2006}}}-1 month}}

''''

{{subst:#time:F Y|{{{2|August}}} {{{1|20}}} {{{3|2006}}}-1 month}}

''''
{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#time:F Y|{{{2|{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}}}}} {{{1|{{CURRENTDAY}}}}} {{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}-1 month}}<noinclude>{{Reference desk navigation/Note}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: replace {{{1|{{CURRENTDAY}}}}} by 1 to ensure that -1 month gives a valid day in the previous month; fixes bug where for example {{LastMonth|March|31|2012}} produced March 2012 instead of February 2012
revision.text: {{{{{|safesubst:}}}#time:F Y|{{{2|{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}}}}} 1 {{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}-1 month}}<noinclude>{{Reference desk navigation/Note}}</noinclude>
{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#time:F|{{{2|{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}}}}} 1 {{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}-1 month}}
#REDIRECT [[LASTMONTHNAME]]
#REDIRECT [[Template:LASTMONTHNAME]]

revision.comment: Reverted to revision 601569427 by [[Special:Contributions/Wbm1058|Wbm1058]]: Changes broke usage in [[Template:HD Archive header]] and five other templates using substitution to make navigation headers in archive pages. ([[WP:TW|TW]])

revision.text: {{{{{|safesubst:}}}#time:F Y|{{{2|{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}}}}} 1 {{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}-1 month}}

revision.comment:
{{documentation|content= '''Month:'''
{{tl|Lmonth}} produces {{Lmonth}}
{{tl|Nmonth}} produces {{Nmonth}}
{{tl|LastMonth}} produces {{LastMonth}}
{{tl|NextMonth}} produces {{NextMonth}} == See also == *{{tl|Calendar}} *{{tl|Calendar clock with Wikipedia stats}} *{{tl|Clock}} *{{tl|Digital clock}} *{{tl|Digital clock and date}} }}
HouseBlaster moved page [[Template:LastMonth]] to [[Template:Last month]]: expand template name per [[WP:TPN]]

Protected "[[Template:Last month]]": [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|High-risk template or module]]: 264 transclusions ([[User:MusikBot II/TemplateProtector|more info]]) ([Edit=Require autoconfirmed or confirmed access] (indefinite))
Switch to consolidated documentation at [[Template:This month/doc]]
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{{{{|safesubst:}}}#time:F Y|{{{2|{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}}}}} 1 {{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}-1 month}}<noinclude> {{documentation|Template:This month/doc}} </noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{{{{|safesubst:}}}#time:F Y|{{{2|{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}}}}} 1 {{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}-1 month}}<noinclude> {{documentation|Template:This month/doc}} </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23508203007|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{{{{|safesubst:}}}#time:F Y|{{{2|{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}}}}} 1 {{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}-1 month}}<noinclude> {{documentation|Template:This month/doc}} </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#time:F Y|{{{2|{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}}}}} 1 {{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}-1 month}}<noinclude> {{documentation|Template:This month/doc}}
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
